name: Insert Outlier Rejection After Detection
intent: Reject event intervals that are implausible enough to destabilize downstream rate estimation.
expected_information_flow_effect: Adds a bounded event-cleaning stage between detection and rate measurement.

audit.rationale: Rate estimation should not be forced to absorb obvious detector outliers when a family-level cleanup stage is available.
audit.dejargonized_summary: If the detected beats create impossible gaps, clean those detections before computing the final rate.
uncertainty_notes: Event-cleaning can remove true positives if the detector is already too sparse.

references.title: Signal event rate refinement inventory
references.citation: Local transitional family refinement asset for event interval cleanup.
